prestazioni: Engine swap to a Nissan SR20DET Red Top (205ps stock) with a Tomei 264° camshaft kit, HKS GT-SS turbo manifold, and Garrett GT2860RS turbo (0.86 A/R, 62 trim) for 350whp on E85 fuel, paired with a Nismo 555cc top-feed fuel injector set and Walbro 450LPH in-tank pump

Custom 3-inch turbo-back exhaust system by Fujitsubo Giken (stainless steel, 4-2-1 merge collector) with a 200-cell GReddy SP2 catalytic converter and HKS Hi-Power Super Sonic muffler for optimized spool and backpressure management

Nismo Type-B limited-slip differential (R200, 1.5-way) with Cusco 2-way adjustable LSD oil (80W-140 viscosity) and reinforced half-shafts by Driveshaft Shop (Stage 2, chromoly steel) to handle increased torque
estetica: Rocket Bunny Rasheen-specific widebody kit (Version 2, fiberglass construction) with custom front splitter and rear diffuser by TRA Kyoto, finished in Nissan 'Active Red' (code: AJ1) with matte black accents

Work Equip 05 wheels (15x8 +25 front, 15x9 +30 rear) wrapped in Yokohama Advan A052 tires (195/50R15 front, 225/45R15 rear) with custom wheel spacers (15mm front, 20mm rear) by 5Zigen for aggressive flush fitment

Custom interior roll cage by Auto Power (6-point, mild steel, bolt-in) with Bride Zeta IV bucket seats (fixed-back, FIA-approved) and Takata Drift III 4-point harnesses, upholstered in Nissan 'Black Cloth' (code: KH3) with red stitching by Status Racing
